chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 3683 of 2016. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.01.2018. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTIONS. FOR KATCHA PESHI. Mr. Ashfaque Ali Khaskheli, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Badruddin Khoso, Advocate for respondent. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari, A.P.G. for the State. ----- After hearing the learned counsel for the parties at some considerable length learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would be satisfied and shall not press this petition if the petitioner/complainant Nizamuddin is allowed to file a direct complaint with regard to subject matter for redressal of his grievances. Learned advocate for the proposed accused and learned A.P.G. have raised their no objection. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of with direction to the petitioner to file direct complaint if he so desire and law permits and the trial court shall then decide the direct complaint as per law after hearing the parties. It may be mentioned here that the learned Sessions Judge will ensure that if direct complaint filed the same shall be entrusted to any Judicial Officer other than who passed impugned order. Disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE A.
